ddls:
CREATE TABLE "professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professional */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the professional */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the professional */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "languages_spoken" TEXT /* Languages spoken by the professional */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the professional */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the professional */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the professional's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the professional */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the professional's personal or professional website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or practice area of the professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential */,
  "credential_name" TEXT /* Name of the credential */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the credential */,
  "issuing_institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution that issued the credential */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the credential was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professional_credentials" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a professional and a credential */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credential */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the credential was issued to the professional */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credential for the professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professional_credentials_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professional_credentials_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for therapy */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who provided the review */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the client (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the client */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is anonymous */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the appointment */,
  "appointment_length" INTEGER /* Length of the appointment in minutes */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "reason_for_appointment" TEXT /* Reason the client is seeking therapy */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who made the payment */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the appointment for which the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialization */,
  "recommended_for" TEXT /* Conditions or issues the specialization is recommended for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professional_specializations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between a professional and a specialization */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specialization */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date the professional was certified in the specialization */,
  "certification_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professional_specializations_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professional_specializations_specialization_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialization_id") REFERENCES specializations ("specialization_id")
)
